meaning: n.皮(可)秒,微微秒,百亿分之一秒(时间单位,符号为psec 或 ps)
examples: A dye laser system used as a pulsed light source for picosecond photography of laser-produced plasma is described.
Optical switch phenomenon of 7-hydroxyquinoline with excited state proton transfer effect was investigated using picosecond laser pulses.
The numerical results show that picosecond pulses can be compressed effectively, if the parameters of gratings and pulses were chosen properly.
